name: Tree
description: Tree is used to display hierarchical data.

props.name: value
props.description: An array of treenodes.

props.name: expandedKeys
props.description: A map of keys to represent the expansion state in controlled mode.

props.name: selectionKeys
props.description: A map of keys to control the selection state.

props.name: selectionMode
props.description: Defines the selection mode.

props.name: metaKeySelection
props.description: Defines how multiple items can be selected, when true metaKey needs to be pressed to select or unselect an item and when set to false selection of each item can be toggled individually. On touch enabled devices, metaKeySelection is turned off automatically.

props.name: loading
props.description: Whether to display loading indicator.

props.name: loadingIcon
props.description: Icon to display when tree is loading.

props.name: loadingMode
props.description: Loading mode display.

props.name: filter
props.description: When specified, displays an input field to filter the items.

props.name: filterBy
props.description: When filtering is enabled, filterBy decides which field or fields (comma separated) to search against. A callable taking a TreeNode can be provided instead of a list of field names.

props.name: filterMode
props.description: Mode for filtering.

props.name: filterPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder text to show when filter input is empty.

props.name: filterLocale
props.description: Locale to use in filtering. The default locale is the host environment's current locale.

props.name: highlightOnSelect
props.description: Highlights automatically the first item. @defaultValue false

props.name: scrollHeight
props.description: Height of the scroll viewport in fixed units or the 'flex' keyword for a dynamic size.

props.name: draggableNodes
props.description: Whether the nodes are draggable.

props.name: droppableNodes
props.description: Whether the nodes are droppable.

props.name: draggableScope
props.description: Scope of the draggable nodes to match a droppableScope.

props.name: droppableScope
props.description: Scope of the droppable nodes to match a draggableScope.

props.name: validateDrop
props.description: When enabled, drop can be accepted or rejected based on condition defined at node-drop.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Defines a string value that labels an interactive element.

props.name: ariaLabelledby
props.description: Identifier of the underlying menu element.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: update:expandedKeys
events.description: Emitted when the expanded keys change.

events.name: update:selectionKeys
events.description: Emitted when the selection keys change.

events.name: node-select
events.description: Callback to invoke when a node is selected.

events.name: node-unselect
events.description: Callback to invoke when a node is unselected.

events.name: node-expand
events.description: Callback to invoke when a node is expanded.

events.name: node-collapse
events.description: Callback to invoke when a node is collapsed.

events.name: node-drop
events.description: Callback to invoke when a node is collapsed.

events.name: node-dragenter
events.description: Callback to invoke when a dragged element enters a node.

events.name: node-dragleave
events.description: Callback to invoke when a dragged element leaves a node.

events.name: filter
events.description: Callback to invoke on filter input.

events.name: drag-enter
events.description: Callback to invoke on drag enter.

events.name: drag-leave
events.description: Callback to invoke on drag leave.

slots.name: default
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Tree node instance */ node: TreeNode; /** * Selection state */ selected: boolean; /** * Expanded state */ expanded: boolean; }): VNode[]

slots.name: loadingicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]

slots.name: searchicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]

slots.name: filtericon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]

slots.name: togglericon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Tree node instance */ node: TreeNode; /** * Expanded state of the node */ expanded: boolean; }): VNode[]

slots.name: nodetogglericon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Tree node instance */ node: TreeNode; /** * Expanded state of the node */ expanded: boolean; }): VNode[]

slots.name: nodetoggleicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Tree node instance */ node: TreeNode; /** * Expanded state of the node */ expanded: boolean; }): VNode[]

slots.name: nodeicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Tree node instance */ node: TreeNode; /** * Style class of the icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]

slots.name: checkboxicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Check state of the node */ checked: boolean; /** * Partial check state of the node */ partialChecked: boolean; }): VNode[]

slots.name: header
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Current value */ value: TreeNode[]; /** * Current expanded key */ expandedKeys: TreeExpandedKeys; /** * Current selected keys */ selectionKeys: TreeSelectionKeys; }): VNode[]

slots.name: footer
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Current value */ value: TreeNode[]; /** * Current expanded key */ expandedKeys: TreeExpandedKeys; /** * Current selected keys */ selectionKeys: TreeSelectionKeys; }): VNode[]
